title: Bridge Essay: Self as an Aesthetic Effect.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Self, as, an, Aesthetic, Effect..

**Self as an Aesthetic Effect.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 31316422. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2019.01433. Mainstream psychology has assumed anotion of the self that seems to rest on asubstantialist notion of the psyche that became predominant despite important critical theories about the self. Although cultural psychology has recognized the diverse, dialogical, historical, narrative, and performative nature of self, as opposed to the idea of self as entity, it is not clear how it accounts for the phenomenological experience of self as aunified image.
